form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 8 m finishing fourth behind Fear Danie at The Meadows over 1609m in a FMW3NW6EXT on March 26 at $25. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.5 m finishing second behind Mckira at The Meadows over 1609m in a FMNW3500L4 on April 1 at $1.20. Has the ability to play a major role.
